name: 燃烧之血
description: At the end of combat, heal 6 HP.
descriptionZh: 在战斗结束时，回复6点生命。

name: 蛇之戒指
description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，额外抽2张牌。

name: 天赋君权
description: At the start of each combat, gain.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1 点星能。

name: 缚魂命匣
description: At the start of your turn, Summon 1.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，召唤1

name: 破损核心
description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，生成1个闪电充能球。

name: 黑暗之血
description: At the end of combat, heal 12 HP.
descriptionZh: 在战斗结束时，回复12点生命。

name: 天命所归
description: At the start of each combat, gain.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1 点星能。

name: 注能核心
description: At the start of each combat, Channel 3 Lightning.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，生成3个闪电充能球。

name: 无界命匣
description: At the start of each combat, Summon 5. At the start of your turn, Summon 2.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，召唤5。在你的回合开始时，召唤2。

name: 长蛇戒指
description: At the start of your first 3 turns, draw 2 additional cards.
descriptionZh: 在战斗开始时的前3个回合，你额外抽2张牌。

name: 红头骨
description: While your HP is at or below 50%, you have 3 additional Strength.
descriptionZh: 当你的生命值低于或等于50%时，你额外获得3点力量

name: 异蛇头骨
description: Whenever you apply Poison, apply an additional 1 Poison.
descriptionZh: 每当你给予敌人中毒时，所给予的中毒层数增加1层。

name: 击剑指南
description: At the start of each combat, Forge 10.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，铸造10。

name: 骨笛
description: Whenever Osty attacks, gain 2 Block.
descriptionZh: 每当奥斯提攻击时，获得2点格挡。

name: 数据磁盘
description: Start each combat with 1 Focus.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点集中。

name: 紫水晶茄子
description: Enemies drop 10 additional Gold.
descriptionZh: 敌人额外掉落10金币。

name: 锚
description: Start each combat with 10 Block.
descriptionZh: 每场战斗开始时获得10点格挡。

name: 准备背包
description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，额外抽2张牌。

name: 小血瓶
description: At the start of each combat, heal 2 HP.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，回复2点生命。

name: 五轮书
description: Every 5 cards you add to your Deck, heal 15 HP.
descriptionZh: 你每将5张牌加入你的牌组时，回复15点生命。

name: 铜质鳞片
description: Start each combat with 3 Thorns.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得3点荆棘。

name: 百年积木
description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw 3 cards.
descriptionZh: 你在每场战斗中第一次损失生命值时，抽3张牌。

name: 节日拉炮
description: At the start of each combat, deal 9 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，对所有敌人造成9点伤害。

name: 护喉甲
description: At the start of each combat, gain 4 Plating.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得4层覆甲。

name: 开心小花
description: Every 3 turns, gain.
descriptionZh: 每3个回合，获得1 点能量。

name: 佛珠手链
description: Regular enemy combats are no longer encountered in ? rooms.
descriptionZh: 你在问号房间中不会再遭遇常规战斗。

name: 灯笼
description: Start each combat with an additional.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗的第一回合获得1 点能量。

name: 餐券
description: Whenever you enter a shop room, heal 15 HP.
descriptionZh: 每当你进入商店房间时，回复15点生命。

name: 意外光滑的石头
description: Start each combat with 1 Dexterity.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点敏捷。

name: 摆动球
description: Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, draw a card.
descriptionZh: 每当你将抽牌堆洗牌时，抽1张牌。

name: 永冻冰晶
description: The first time you play a Power each combat, gain 6 Block.
descriptionZh: 当你在战斗中第一次打出能力牌时，获得6点格挡。

name: 药水腰带
description: Upon pickup, gain 2 potion slots.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得1个药水栏位。

name: 皇家枕头
description: Whenever you Rest, heal an additional 15 HP.
descriptionZh: 在休息时，额外回复15点生命。

name: 草莓
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升5。

name: 打击木偶
description: Cards containing “Strike” deal 3 additional damage.
descriptionZh: 名字中有“打击”的卡牌造成3点额外伤害。

name: 小邮箱
description: Whenever you Rest, procure a random potion.
descriptionZh: 每当你休息时，获得一瓶随机药水。

name: 金刚杵
description: Start each combat with 1 Strength.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点力量。

name: 古茶具套装
description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with an additional.
descriptionZh: 到达休息处后的下一场战斗开始时额外获得1 点能量。

name: 战纹涂料
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Skills.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，随机升级2张技能牌。

name: 磨刀石
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Attacks.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，随机升级2张攻击牌。

name: 纸蛙
description: Enemies with Vulnerable take 75% more damage rather than 50%.
descriptionZh: 有易伤状态的敌人受到的伤害增加75%而非50%。

name: 自成型黏土
description: Whenever you lose HP in combat, gain 3 Block next turn.
descriptionZh: 每当你在战斗中失去生命，就在下回合获得3点格挡。

name: 铜钹
description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy for each card discarded.
descriptionZh: 你每在你的回合丢弃一张牌，就对一名随机敌人造成3点伤害。

name: 扭曲漏斗
description: At the start of each combat, apply 4 Poison to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人4层中毒。

name: 星系尘埃
description: For every 10 spent, gain 10 Block.
descriptionZh: 每消耗10点能量，就获得10点格挡。

name: 君王矿石
description: Whenever you create a Colorless card, gain 2 Block.
descriptionZh: 每当你生成一张无色牌时，获得2点格挡。

name: 修书小刀
description: Whenever a non-Minion enemy dies to Doom, heal 3 HP.
descriptionZh: 每当有一名不是“爪牙”的敌人死于灾厄时，回复3点生命。

name: 葬礼面具
description: At the start of each combat, add 3 Souls into your Draw Pile.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，将3张灵魂加入你的抽牌堆。

name: 镀金缆线
description: Your rightmost Orb triggers its passive an additional time.
descriptionZh: 你最右侧的充能球会额外触发一次被动效果。

name: 共生病毒
description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Dark.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，生成1个黑暗充能球。

name: 赤牛
description: At the start of each combat, gain 8 Vigor.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点活力。

name: 弹珠袋
description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人1层易伤。

name: 风箱
description: The first Hand you draw each combat is Upgraded.
descriptionZh: 你在每场战斗开始时的手牌，将被升级。

name: 圆顶礼帽
description: Gain 20% additional Gold.
descriptionZh: 额外获得20%的金币。

name: 烛台
description: At the start of your 2nd turn, gain.
descriptionZh: 在你的第2回合开始时，获得1 点能量。

name: 永恒羽毛
description: For every 5 cards in your Deck, heal 3 HP whenever you enter a Rest Site.
descriptionZh: 你的牌组中每有5张牌，当你进入休息处时就会回复3点生命。

name: 地精之角
description: Whenever an enemy dies, gain and draw 1 card.
descriptionZh: 每当有一名敌人死亡时，获得1点能量并抽1张牌。

name: 船夹板
description: At the start of your 2nd turn, gain 14 Block.
descriptionZh: 在你的第二回合开始时，获得14点格挡。

name: 金纸
description: Every 5 times you Exhaust a card, draw 1 card.
descriptionZh: 你每消耗5张牌，就抽1张牌。

name: 锁镰
description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, deal 6 damage to a random enemy.
descriptionZh: 你每在同一回合内打出3张攻击牌，就随机对一名敌人造成6点伤害。

name: 开信刀
description: Every time you play 3 Skills in a single turn, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 你每在同一回合内打出3张技能牌，就对所有敌人造成5点伤害。

name: 招财异鱼
description: Whenever you add a card to your Deck, gain 15 Gold.
descriptionZh: 每当你将一张卡牌加入你的牌组时，获得15金币。

name: 水银沙漏
description: At the start of your turn, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，对所有敌人造成3点伤害。

name: 微型大炮
description: Upgraded Attacks deal 3 additional damage.
descriptionZh: 升级的攻击牌额外造成3点伤害。

name: 双截棍
description: Every time you play 10 Attacks, gain.
descriptionZh: 你每打出10张攻击牌，获得1点能量。

name: 奥利哈钢
description: If you end your turn without Block, gain 6 Block.
descriptionZh: 如果你在回合结束时没有任何格挡，获得6点格挡。

name: 精致折扇
description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 4 Block.
descriptionZh: 你每在同一回合内打出3张攻击牌，就获得4点格挡。

name: 缩放仪
description: At the start of each Boss combat, heal 25 HP.
descriptionZh: 在Boss战开始时，回复25点生命值。

name: 招架盾
description: If you end a turn with at least 10 Block, deal 6 damage to a random enemy.
descriptionZh: 如果你在回合结束时拥有至少10点格挡，则对随机敌人造成6点伤害。

name: 梨子
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 10.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升5。

name: 钢笔尖
description: Every 10th Attack you play deals double damage.
descriptionZh: 你每打出的第10张攻击牌将会造成双倍伤害。

name: 石化蟾蜍
description: At the start of each combat, procure a Potion-Shaped Rock.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得一瓶药水形状的石头

name: 活动星图
description: Whenever you enter a ? room, heal 4 HP.
descriptionZh: 每当你进入？房间的时候，回复4点生命。

name: 红面具
description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Weak to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人1层虚弱。

name: 爬行动物饰品
description: Whenever you use a potion, gain 3 Strength this turn.
descriptionZh: 当你使用药水时，在本回合获得3力量。

name: 波纹水盆
description: If you did not play any Attacks during your turn, gain 4 Block.
descriptionZh: 如果你在本回合中没有打出过攻击牌，则获得4点格挡。

name: 闪亮口红
description: At the start of your 3rd turn, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity.
descriptionZh: 在你的第3回合开始时，获得1点力量和1点敏捷。

name: 碎石钻
description: At the start of Boss combats, Upgrade 3 random cards in your Draw Pile for the rest of combat.
descriptionZh: 在Boss战开始时，在本场战斗中随机升级你抽牌堆中的3张牌。

name: 音叉
description: Every time you play 10 Skills, gain 7 Block.
descriptionZh: 你每打出10张技能牌，获得7点格挡。

name: 臂甲
description: The first time you gain Block from a card each combat, double the amount gained.
descriptionZh: 每场战斗中，你第一次从卡牌中获得的格挡值翻倍。

name: 卡戎之灰
description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 每当你消耗一张牌，对所有敌人造成3点伤害。

name: 恶魔之舌
description: The first time you lose HP on your turn, heal HP equal to the amount lost.
descriptionZh: 当你第一次在自身回合内失去生命值时，回复等量的生命值。

name: 损毁头盔
description: The first time you gain Strength each combat, double the amount gained.
descriptionZh: 你在每场战斗中第一次获得的力量值翻倍。

name: 螺线飞镖
description: Whenever you play a Shiv, gain 1 Dexterity this turn.
descriptionZh: 你每打出一张小刀，就在本回合获得1点敏捷。

name: 纸鹤
description: Enemies with Weak deal 40% less damage to you rather than 25%.
descriptionZh: 有虚弱状态的敌人造成的伤害降低40%而非25%。

name: 结实绷带
description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain 3 Block.
descriptionZh: 你每在你的回合丢弃一张牌，就获得3点格挡。

name: 月亮糕点
description: At the end of your turn, gain.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合结束时，获得1 点星能。

name: 迷你储君
description: The first time you spend each turn, gain 1 Strength.
descriptionZh: 每回合你第一次花费能量时，获得1点力量。

name: 橙色团块
description: At the start of each combat, add 2 random Colorless cards into your Hand.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，将2张随机无色牌加入你的手牌。

name: 大帽子
description: At the start of each combat, add 2 random Ethereal cards into your Hand.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，将2张随机虚无牌加入你的手牌。

name: 书签
description: At the end of each turn, lower the cost of a random Retained card by 1 until played.
descriptionZh: 在每个回合结束时，将随机一张被保留的牌，直到被打出前耗能减少1。

name: 象牙麻将牌
description: Whenever you play a card that costs or more, gain.
descriptionZh: 每当你打出一张耗能大于等于2点的牌时，获得1点能量。

name: 情感芯片
description: If you lost HP during the previous turn, trigger the passive ability of all Orbs at the start of your turn.
descriptionZh: 在每回合开始时，如果你在之前回合受到过伤害，则触发所有充能球的被动效果。

name: 节拍器
description: The first time you Channel 7 Orbs each combat, deal 30 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 每场战斗中你首次生成7个充能球时，对所有敌人造成30点伤害。

name: 能量电池
description: At the start of each combat, add 2 zero-cost cards from your Draw Pile into your Hand.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，将2张耗能为0的卡牌从你的抽牌堆放入你的手牌。

name: 孙子兵法
description: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain an additional next turn.
descriptionZh: 如果你在本回合中没有打出过攻击牌，则在下一回合额外获得1点1 点能量。

name: 律动残余
description: You cannot lose more than 20 HP in a single turn.
descriptionZh: 你在一回合内失去的生命值不会超过20点。

name: 舵盘
description: At the start of your 3rd turn, gain 18 Block.
descriptionZh: 在你的第三回合开始时，获得18点格挡。

name: 吊灯
description: At the start of your 3rd turn, gain.
descriptionZh: 在你的第三回合开始时，获得1 点能量。

name: 斗篷扣
description: At the end of your turn, gain 1 Block for each card in your Hand.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合结束时，每有一张手牌，就获得1点格挡

name: 冻结之蛋
description: Whenever you add a Power into your Deck, Upgrade it.
descriptionZh: 每当你获得能力牌时，将其升级。

name: 赌博筹码
description: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，丢弃任意张牌，然后抽相同数量张牌。

name: 棋子
description: Whenever you play a Power, draw 1 card.
descriptionZh: 每当你打出能力牌时，抽1张牌。

name: 壶铃
description: You can now gain Strength at Rest Sites. (3 times max)
descriptionZh: 你现在能在休息处获得力量。（最多3次）

name: 冰淇淋
description: Energy is now conserved between turns.
descriptionZh: 多余的能量可以留到下一回合。

name: 骇人头盔
description: Whenever you play a card that costs or more, gain 4 Block.
descriptionZh: 每当你打出一张耗能大于等于1 点能量的牌，获得4点格挡。

name: 苦无
description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Dexterity.
descriptionZh: 你每在同一回合内打出3张攻击牌，就获得1点敏捷。

name: 吃不完的糖
description: Every other combat, your card rewards gain an additional Power.
descriptionZh: 每两场战斗，你的卡牌奖励就会额外包含一张能力牌。

name: 蜥蜴尾巴
description: When you would die, heal to 50% of your Max HP instead (works once).
descriptionZh: 当你要被杀死时，免死并回复到最大生命值的50%（仅能起效一次）。

name: 芒果
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 14.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升5。

name: 带骨肉
description: If your HP is at or below 50% at the end of combat, heal 12 HP.
descriptionZh: 如果你在战斗结束时生命值等于或低于50%，回复12点生命。

name: 熔火之蛋
description: Whenever you add an Attack card to your Deck, Upgrade it.
descriptionZh: 每当你获得攻击牌时，将其升级。

name: 干瘪之手
description: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your Hand is free to play that turn.
descriptionZh: 你每打出一张能力牌，手牌中就有一张随机牌在这个回合可以免费打出。

name: 古钱币
description: Upon pickup, gain 300 Gold.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得300金币。

name: 怀表
description: Whenever you play 3 or fewer cards during your turn, draw 3 additional cards at the start of your next turn.
descriptionZh: 当你在本回合打出的牌少于等于3张时，则在你的下个回合开始时额外抽3张牌。

name: 转经轮
description: Normal enemies drop an additional card reward.
descriptionZh: 普通敌人额外掉落一组卡牌奖励。

name: 彩虹戒指
description: The first time you play an Attack, Skill, and Power each turn, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity.
descriptionZh: 每回合，你第一次打出攻击牌、技能牌和能力牌各一张时，获得1点力量和1点敏捷。

name: 剃刀牙
description: Every time you play an Attack or Skill, Upgrade it for the remainder of combat.
descriptionZh: 你打出攻击牌和技能牌时，将其在本场战斗内升级。

name: 铲子
description: You can now dig at Rest Sites to obtain a random Relic.
descriptionZh: 现在你可以在休息处挖掘遗物。

name: 手里剑
description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Strength.
descriptionZh: 你每在同一回合内打出3张攻击牌，获得1点力量。

name: 历石
description: At the end of turn 7, deal 52 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 在第7回合结束时，对所有敌人造成52点伤害。

name: 坚固钳子
description: Up to 10 Block persists across turns.
descriptionZh: 可以跨回合保留最多10点格挡。

name: 送货员
description: The merchant no longer runs out of cards, relics, or potions and his prices are reduced by 20%.
descriptionZh: 商人的卡牌、遗物和药水不再会卖光，并且所有商品打折20%。

name: 毒素之蛋
description: Whenever you add a Skill into your Deck, Upgrade it.
descriptionZh: 每当你获得技能牌时，将其升级。

name: 钨合金棍
description: Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.
descriptionZh: 你每次失去生命时，减少失去的生命值1点。

name: 不休陀螺
description: Whenever you have no cards in Hand during your turn, draw a card.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合，当你没有手牌时，抽一张牌。

name: 不安油灯
description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that Debuffs an enemy, double its effect.
descriptionZh: 你在每场战斗中第一次打出能给予敌人负面状态的牌时，将其效果翻倍。

name: 烦人机关盒
description: At the start of each combat, add a random card into your Hand. It costs 0.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，将一张随机卡牌加入你的手牌。这张牌的耗能变为0。

name: 白兽雕像
description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.
descriptionZh: 战斗结束后必定掉落药水。

name: 白星
description: Elites drop an additional Rare card reward.
descriptionZh: 精英敌人额外掉落一组稀有卡牌奖励。

name: 硫磺
description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 Strength and ALL enemies gain 1 Strength.
descriptionZh: 在你的每个回合开始时，你获得2点力量，所有敌人获得1点力量。

name: 忍术卷轴
description: At the start of each combat, add 3 Shivs into your Hand.
descriptionZh: 战斗开始时, add 3 小刀s into 你的手牌.

name: 维特鲁威仆从
description: Cards containing “Minion” deal double damage and gain double Block.
descriptionZh: 名字中有“仆从”的卡牌造成双倍的伤害与格挡。

name: 不死符文
description: Enemies with at least as much Doom as HP deal 50% less damage.
descriptionZh: 当敌人的灾厄层数大于等于其生命值时，它造成的伤害降低50%。

name: 符文电容器
description: Start each combat with 3 additional Orb Slots.
descriptionZh: 每场战斗开始时，获得3个额外充能球栏位。

name: 腰带扣
description: While you have no potions, you have 2 additional Dexterity.
descriptionZh: 当你没有药水时，你额外拥有1点敏捷。

name: 面包
description: At the start of your first turn, lose. At the start of all other turns, gain.
descriptionZh: 在你的第一个回合开始时，失去1 点能量。在其余的回合开始时，获得1 点能量。

name: 燃烧木棍
description: The first time each combat you Exhaust a Skill, add a copy of it into your Hand.
descriptionZh: 每场战斗中你第一次消耗技能牌时，将那张牌的复制品加入你的手牌

name: 大锅
description: Upon pickup, brews 5 random potions.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，制作5瓶随机药水。

name: 化学物X
description: The effects of your cost X cards are increased by 2.
descriptionZh: 耗能为X的牌的效果数值增加2点。

name: 肮脏地毯
description: Card rewards can now contain Colorless cards.
descriptionZh: 卡牌奖励现在会包括无色牌。

name: 多利之镜
description: Upon pickup, obtain an additional copy of a card in your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中选择一张牌进行复制。

name: 火龙果
description: Whenever you gain Gold, raise your Max HP by 1.
descriptionZh: 每当你获得金币时，提升5点你的最大生命值。

name: 幽灵种子
description: Strikes and Defends gain Ethereal.
descriptionZh: 打击和防御获得虚无。

name: 扭曲锤子
description: Upon pickup, Enchant up to 3 Attacks with Sharp 3.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中选择至多3张攻击牌，附魔：锋利3。

name: 木札
description: Upon pickup, Enchant up to 3 cards with Adroit.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中选择至多3张牌，附魔：伶俐。

name: 熔岩灯
description: At the end of combat, Upgrade all card rewards if you took no damage.
descriptionZh: 在战斗结束时，如果你没有受伤，则升级你的所有卡牌奖励。

name: 李家华夫饼
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7 and heal all of your HP.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升5点，并回复所有生命。

name: 会员卡
description: 50% discount on all products!
descriptionZh: 所有商品打折50%！

name: 微型帐篷
description: You may choose any number of options at Rest Sites.
descriptionZh: 你可以在休息处选择任意数量的选项。

name: 神秘打火机
description: Enchanted Attacks deal 9 additional damage.
descriptionZh: 有附魔的攻击牌额外造成9点伤害。

name: 星系仪
description: Upon pickup, gain 5 card rewards.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得5组卡牌奖励。

name: 拳刃
description: Upon pickup, Enchant an Attack with Momentum 5.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，选择一张攻击牌为它附魔：动量5。

name: 三角铃鼓
description: Retain your Hand on the first turn of combat.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗的第一回合保留你的手牌。

name: 王室印章
description: Upon pickup, choose an Attack or Skill in your Deck to Enchant with Royally Approved.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从牌组中选择一张攻击牌或技能牌，为它附魔：王室认可。

name: 尖叫酒壶
description: If you end your turn with no cards in your Hand, deal 20 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 如果你在回合结束时没有任何手牌，则对所有敌人造成20点伤害。

name: 勇气投石索
description: Start each Elite combat with 2 Strength.
descriptionZh: 在与精英敌人战斗时，获得2点力量。

name: 算盘
description: Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, gain 6 Block.
descriptionZh: 你每次将抽牌堆洗牌时，获得6点格挡。

name: 工具箱
description: At the start of each combat, choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your Hand.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，从3张随机无色牌中选择1张加入你的手牌。

name: 羽翼护符
description: A random card in each card reward is Enchanted with Swift 1.
descriptionZh: 每组卡牌奖励中，都会有随机一张牌被附魔：迅捷1。

name: 星盘
description: Upon pickup, Transform 3 cards, then Upgrade them.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，选择3张牌进行变化，然后将这些牌升级。

name: 黑星
description: Elites drop an additional Relic when defeated.
descriptionZh: 精英敌人在被打败时多掉落一件遗物。

name: 召唤铃铛
description: Upon pickup, obtain a unique Curse and 3 Relics.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得一个独特的诅咒和3件遗物。

name: 尘封魔典
description: Upon pickup, obtain an Ancient Card.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得一张一张牌+|先古牌}。

name: 灵体外质
description: You can no longer gain Gold. Gain at the start of each turn.
descriptionZh: 你不能再获得任何金币。在回合开始时获得1 点能量

name: 空鸟笼
description: Upon pickup, remove 2 cards from your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾取时, remove 2 cards from 你的牌组.

name: 潘多拉魔盒
description: Transform ALL Strikes and Defends.
descriptionZh: 变化所有“打击”和“防御”。

name: 贤者之石
description: Gain at the start of each turn. ALL enemies start combat with 1 Strength.
descriptionZh: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。所有敌人初始获得1点力量。

name: 符文金字塔
description: At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your Hand.
descriptionZh: 你在回合结束时不再自动丢弃所有手牌。

name: 异蛇之眼
description: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards. Start each combat Confused.
descriptionZh: 每回合多抽2张牌。每场战斗开始时获得混乱效果。

name: 添水
description: Gain at the start of each turn. You can no longer obtain potions.
descriptionZh: 你无法再获得药水。在每回合开始时获得1 点能量。

name: 天鹅绒颈圈
description: Gain at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than 6 cards per turn.
descriptionZh: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。你每回合不能打出超过6张牌。

name: 奥术卷轴
description: Upon pickup, obtain a random Rare Card to add to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将一张随机稀有牌加入你的牌组。

name: 轰鸣海螺
description: At the start of Elite combats, draw 2 additional cards.
descriptionZh: 在精英战的战斗开始时，额外抽2张牌。

name: 诅咒珍珠
description: Upon pickup, receive Greed. Gain 333 Gold.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得一张贪婪，获得333金币。

name: 金色珍珠
description: Upon pickup, gain 150 Gold.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得150金币。

name: 巨大扭蛋
description: Upon pickup, obtain 2 random Relics. Add an additional Strike and Defend to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得2件随机遗物。额外将一对打击和防御，加入你的牌组。

name: 熔岩石
description: The Act 1 Boss drops 2 Relics.
descriptionZh: 第一阶段的Boss敌人额外掉落2件遗物。

name: 铅制镇纸
description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 2 Colorless cards to add to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从2张无色牌中选择1张加入你的牌组。

name: 树叶药膏
description: Upon pickup, Transform 1 of your Strikes and 1 of your Defends and lose 10 Max HP.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，变化你的1张打击和1张防御，然后失去5点最大生命。

name: 失物盒
description: Upon pickup, gain 1 card reward and procure 1 random potion.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得1组卡牌奖励和1瓶随机药水。

name: 巨大卷轴
description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 3 Multiplayer Colorless Cards to add to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从3张多人游戏无色牌中选择1张加入你的牌组。

name: 涅奥的苦痛
description: Upon pickup, add 1 Neow's Fury to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将1张涅奥之怒加入你的牌组。

name: 新叶
description: Upon pickup, Transform 1 card.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，变化1张牌。

name: 营养牡蛎
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 11.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升5。

name: 橙型香盒
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade a card.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，升级一张牌。

name: 松动羊毛剪
description: Upon pickup, remove 2 cards from your Deck and take 13 damage.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中移除2张牌，并受到13点伤害。

name: 精准剪刀
description: Upon pickup, remove 1 card from your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中移除1张牌。

name: 卷轴箱
description: Upon pickup, lose all Gold and choose 1 of 2 packs of cards to add to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，失去所有金币，并从2个卡牌包中选择1包加入你的牌组。

name: 白银熔炉
description: The first 3 card rewards you see are Upgraded. The first Treasure Chest you open is empty.
descriptionZh: 你遇到的前3组卡牌奖励将是被升级过的。你打开的第一个宝箱将是空的。

name: 小型扭蛋
description: Upon pickup, obtain a random Relic.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得一件随机遗物。

name: 石炉加湿器
description: Whenever you Rest at a Rest Site, raise your Max HP by 5.
descriptionZh: 每当你在休息处休息时，将你的最大生命值提升5点。

name: 华美手镯
description: Upon pickup, choose 3 cards in your Deck. Enchant them with Swift 3.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中选择3张牌，附魔：迅捷3。

name: 赐福鹿角
description: Gain at the start of each turn. At the start of each combat, shuffle 3 Dazed into your Draw Pile.
descriptionZh: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。在战斗开始时，将3张晕眩放入你的抽牌堆。

name: 艳丽围巾
description: The 5th card you play each turn is free.
descriptionZh: 你每回合打出的第5张牌可以被免费打出。

name: 娇嫩蕨草
description: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，用随机药水将你的空药水栏位填满。

name: 钻石头冠
description: Whenever you play 2 or fewer cards in a turn, take half damage from enemies.
descriptionZh: 如果你在本回合打出的牌少于等于2张，则受到敌人的伤害减半。

name: 皮草大衣
description: Upon pickup, mark 7 random combats. Enemies in those rooms have 1 HP.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，随机标记3处战斗。这些战斗中的敌人将只有1点生命。

name: 亮片
description: Enchant all card rewards with Glam.
descriptionZh: 为所有的卡牌奖励附魔：华彩。

name: 珠宝盒
description: Upon pickup, add 1 Apotheosis to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将1张神化加入你的牌组。

name: 布质果实
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 31.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升5。

name: 图章戒指
description: Upon pickup, gain 999 Gold.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得999金币。

name: 炼金箱
description: Upon pickup, gain 4 potion slots filled with random potions.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得1个放有随机药水的药水栏位。

name: 古老牙齿
description: Upon pickup, Transform a starter card with an ancient version.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将一张初始卡牌变化为先古版本。

name: 浮木
description: You may reroll each card reward once.
descriptionZh: 你可以在每一个卡牌奖励中重掷一次。

name: 放电异虾
description: Upon pickup, Enchant a Skill with Imbued.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，选择一张技能牌为它附魔：注能。

name: 玻璃眼珠
description: Upon pickup, obtain 2 Common cards, 2 Uncommon cards, and 1 Rare card.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得2组普通、2组罕见、和1组稀有卡牌奖励。

name: 棱彩宝石
description: Gain at the start of each turn. Card rewards now contain cards from other colors.
descriptionZh: 在每个回合开始时获得1 点能量。卡牌奖励现在会包含其他颜色的卡牌。

name: 发光珍珠
description: At the start of each combat, add 1 Luminesce into your Hand.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，将1张冷光加入你的手牌。

name: 沙堡
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 6 random cards.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，随机升级6张牌。

name: 海玻璃
description: See 15 cards from another character. Choose any number of them to add to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 查看15张来自其他角色的牌。从中选择任意数量的卡牌加入你的牌组。

name: 欧洛巴斯之触
description: Upon pickup, replace your starter Relic with an Ancient version.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的初始遗物替换为先古版本。

name: 佩尔之血
description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，额外抽1张牌

name: 佩尔之爪
description: Upon pickup, Enchant all Defends with Goopy.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，为所有的“防御”附魔：粘稠。

name: 佩尔之眼
description: The first time each combat you end your turn without playing cards, Exhaust your Hand, and take an extra turn.
descriptionZh: 你在每场战斗中第一次没有打出任何牌就结束回合时，消耗所有手牌然后进行一个额外回合。

name: 佩尔之肉
description: Gain an additional at the start of your 3rd turn, and every turn after that.
descriptionZh: 从你的第3回合开始，在回合开始时额外获得1 点能量。

name: 佩尔的增生组织
description: Upon pickup, Enchant a card with Clone.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从牌组中选择一张牌，为其附魔：克隆。

name: 佩尔之角
description: Upon pickup, add 2 Relax to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将2张放松加入你的牌组。

name: 佩尔的士兵
description: Doubles Block gained from a card, then goes to sleep for 2 turns.
descriptionZh: 将你从一张卡牌内获得的格挡翻倍，然后休眠2个回合。

name: 佩尔之泪
description: If you end your turn with unspent, gain an additional next turn.
descriptionZh: 如果你在拥有未花费的能量的情况下结束回合，则下个回合额外获得1点能量。

name: 佩尔之牙
description: Upon pickup, remove 5 cards from your Deck. After each combat, randomly add 1 back Upgraded.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中选择5张牌移除。在每场战斗结束时，将其中随机1张牌升级然后返还。

name: 佩尔之翼
description: You may sacrifice card rewards to Pael. Every 2 sacrifices, obtain a Relic.
descriptionZh: 你可以将你的卡牌奖励献祭给佩尔。每献祭2次，就能获得一件遗物。

name: 利爪
description: Upon pickup, Transform up to 6 cards into Maul.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将至多6张牌变化为撕咬。

name: 十字弓
description: At the start of your turn, add a random Attack into your Hand. It costs 0 this turn.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，将一张随机攻击牌加入你的手牌。这张牌在本回合耗能为0。

name: 铁棒
description: Every 4 cards you play, draw 1 card.
descriptionZh: 你每打出4张牌，就抽1张牌。

name: 切肉刀
description: You may Cook at Rest Sites.
descriptionZh: 你可以在休息处进行烹饪。

name: 钗
description: At the start of your turn, gain 7 Block.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，获得7点格挡。

name: 带刺手甲
description: Gain at the start of each turn. Powers cost 1 more.
descriptionZh: 在每回合开始时获得1点能量。能力牌的耗能增加1点。

name: 坦克斯的哨子
description: Upon pickup, add 1 Whistle to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将1张吹哨加入你的牌组。

name: 投斧
description: The first card you play each combat is played an extra time.
descriptionZh: 你在每场战斗中打出的第一张牌会多打出一次。

name: 三刃回旋镖
description: Choose 3 Attacks in your Deck. Enchant them with Instinct.
descriptionZh: 从你的牌组中选择3张攻击牌。为这些牌附魔：本能。

name: 战锤
description: Whenever you kill an Elite, Upgrade 4 random cards.
descriptionZh: 每当你击败一名精英敌人的时候，随机升级4张牌。

name: 大～抱抱
description: Upon pickup, remove 4 cards from your Deck. Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, add a Soot into your Draw Pile.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中移除4张牌。每当你的抽牌堆打乱洗牌时，将一张煤灰加入你的抽牌堆。

name: 黄金罗盘
description: Upon pickup, replace the Act 2 Map with a single special path.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将第2阶段的地图替换为一条特殊的直道。

name: 营养汤
description: Upon pickup, Enchant all Strikes in your Deck with Tezcatara's Ember.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，为你牌组中的所有“打击”附魔：特兹卡塔拉的余烬

name: 南瓜蜡烛
description: Gain at the start of each turn. Extinguishes at the start of Act 3.
descriptionZh: 在每个回合开始时获得1 点能量。这件遗物将在第3阶段开始时熄灭。

name: 黄金印
description: At the start of your turn, spend 5 Gold to gain.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，花费5金币来获得1点能量。

name: 故事书
description: Upon pickup, add 1 Brightest Flame to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将1张至亮之焰添加到你的牌组中。

name: 烘焙手套
description: At the start of your turn, Exhaust the top card of your Draw Pile and gain 1 Strength.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，消耗你抽牌堆顶部的牌并获得1点力量。

name: 玩具盒
description: Upon pickup, obtain 4 Wax Relics. Every 3 combats, your left-most Wax Relic will melt away.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得4件蜡制遗物。每经过3场战斗，你最左侧的蜡制遗物将会融化。

name: 烫嘴可可
description: Start each combat with an additional [EnergyIcon][EnergyIcon][EnergyIcon][EnergyIcon].
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗的第一回合额外获得1 点能量。

name: 美味饼干
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade 4 cards.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，升级4张牌。

name: 血染玫瑰
description: Upon pickup, add 1 Enthralled to your Deck. Gain at the start of each turn.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将1张执迷加入你的牌组。在回合开始时获得1 点能量。

name: 选择悖论
description: At the start of each combat, add 1 of 5 random cards into your Hand. Add Retain to the chosen card.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，你可以从5张随机牌中选择1张放入你的手牌。然后被选定的那张牌获得保留。

name: 卓越斗篷
description: Upon pickup, lose 9 Max HP. Add 3 Apparitions to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，失去9点最大生命值。将3张灵体加入你的牌组。

name: 小提琴
description: At the start of each turn, draw 2 additional cards. You may not draw cards during your turn.
descriptionZh: 在每个回合开始时，额外抽2张牌。你在回合进行中不再能抽任何牌。

name: 宝石面具
description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your Draw Pile into your Hand, it's free to play.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，将一张随机能力牌从你的抽牌堆放入你的手牌，这张牌可以免费打出。

name: 领主阳伞
description: When you encounter the Merchant, immediately obtain EVERYTHING he sells.
descriptionZh: 当你遇见商人时，立刻获得他所出售的所有物品。

name: 音乐盒
description: Create an Ethereal copy of the first Attack you play each turn.
descriptionZh: 将你每回合打出的第一张攻击牌的一张虚无复制品加入你的手牌。

name: 腌制活雾
description: Upon pickup, remove 5 cards from your Deck. Add Folly to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，从你的牌组中移除5张牌。将一张愚行加入你的牌组。

name: 原初之爪
description: Upon pickup, add 2 random Curses and 3 Wishes to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将2张随机诅咒牌和3张许愿加入你的牌组。

name: 低语耳环
description: Gain at the start of each turn. Vakuu plays your first turn for you.
descriptionZh: 在每个回合开始时，获得1 点能量。瓦库将接管你的第一回合。

name: 锚？？？
description: Start each combat with 4 Block.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得4点格挡。

name: 大蘑菇
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 20. At the start of each combat, draw 2 fewer cards.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升20。在每场战斗开始时，少抽2张牌。

name: 冰梆
description: Whenever you add a card to your Deck, add one additional copy.
descriptionZh: 每当你往牌组中增添卡牌时，都将额外添加一张相同的牌。

name: 小血瓶？？？
description: At the start of each combat, heal 1 HP.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，回复1点生命。

name: 骨茶
description: At the start of the next combat, Upgrade your starting hand.
descriptionZh: 在你接下来的3场战斗开始时，升级你的初始手牌。

name: 异鸟宝宝
description: Upon pickup, gain the card Byrd Swoop. A Byrdpip will accompany you in battles.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，获得一张异鸟扑击。一只幼年异鸟会在战斗中陪伴你。

name: 黑石护符
description: Whenever you obtain a Curse, raise your Max HP by 6.
descriptionZh: 每当你获得一张诅咒，就将你的最大生命值提升5。

name: 风的女儿
description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 Block.
descriptionZh: 每当你打出一张攻击牌时，获得1点格挡。

name: 捕梦网
description: Whenever you Rest, you may add a card to your Deck.
descriptionZh: 每当你休息时，可以添加一张牌到你的牌组。

name: 余烬茶
description: At the start of the next 5 combats, gain 2 Strength.
descriptionZh: 在接下来的3场战斗开始时，获得2点力量。

name: 遗忘之魂
description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 1 damage to a random enemy.
descriptionZh: 每当你消耗一张牌，随机对一名敌人造成1点伤害。

name: 芳香蘑菇
description: Upon pickup, lose 15 HP and Upgrade 3 random cards.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，失去15点生命，然后随机升级3张牌。

name: 菲涅耳透镜
description: Whenever you add a card that gains Block to your Deck, Enchant it with Nimble 2.
descriptionZh: 每当你将一张带有格挡的牌加入你的牌组时，为那张牌附魔：灵巧2。

name: 手钻
description: Whenever you break an enemy's Block, apply 2 Vulnerable.
descriptionZh: 每当你突破敌人的格挡时，给予其1层易伤。

name: 开心小花？？？
description: Every 5 turns, gain.
descriptionZh: 每5个回合，获得1 点能量。

name: 历史课
description: At the start of your turn, play a copy of your last played Attack or Skill.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，打出一张你上一回合最后打出的攻击牌或技能牌的复制品。

name: 李家华夫饼？？？
description: Upon pickup, heal 10% of your HP.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，回复你10%的生命值。

name: 迷失鬼火
description: Whenever you play a Power, deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 你每打出一张能力牌，就对所有敌人造成8点伤害。

name: 芒果？？？
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 3.
descriptionZh: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升5。

name: 巨口储蓄罐
description: Whenever you climb a floor, gain 12 Gold. No longer works when you spend any Gold at the shop.
descriptionZh: 每攀爬一层楼层，就获得12金币。一旦在商店中花费金币就会使其失效。

name: 挣扎先生
description: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to the turn number to ALL enemies.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合开始时，对所有敌人造成等量于当前回合数的伤害。

name: 奥利哈钢？？？
description: If you end your turn without Block, gain 3 Block.
descriptionZh: 如果你在回合结束时没有任何格挡，获得3点格挡。

name: 花粉核心
description: Every 4 turns, draw 2 additional cards.
descriptionZh: 每4个回合，额外抽2张牌。

name: 王室猛毒
description: At the start of each combat, lose 4 HP.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，失去4点生命。

name: 异蛇之眼？？？
description: Start each combat Confused.
descriptionZh: 每场战斗开始时获得混乱效果。

name: 打击木偶？？？
description: Cards containing “Strike” deal 1 additional damage.
descriptionZh: 名字中有“打击”的卡牌造成3点额外伤害。

name: 玉之剑
description: Start each combat with 3 Strength.
descriptionZh: 在每场战斗开始时，获得1点力量。

name: 石之剑
description: Transforms into a powerful Relic after defeating 5 Elites.
descriptionZh: 在击败5名精英敌人之后将变化为一件强力遗物。

name: 无礼之茶
description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle 2 Dazed into your Draw Pile.
descriptionZh: 在下一场战斗开始时，将{DazedCount}张眩晕放入你的抽牌堆。

name: 发条靴
description: Whenever you would deal 4 or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to 5.
descriptionZh: 每当你造成小于等于{DamageThreshold}点未被格挡的攻击伤害时，将伤害提升为{DamageMinimum}。

name: 天选芝士
description: At the end of combat, gain 1 Max HP.
descriptionZh: 在战斗结束时，获得5点最大生命值。

name: 商人的地毯？？？
description: Poor imitation. Does nothing.
descriptionZh: 低劣的仿制品。没有任何作用。

name: 古茶具套装？？？
description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with an additional.
descriptionZh: 到达休息处后的下一场战斗开始时额外获得1 点能量。

name: 旺购客户感恩徽章
description: Does nothing.
descriptionZh: 没有任何作用。

name: 旺购神秘券
description: Receive 3 random Relics after 5 combats.
descriptionZh: 在{RemainingCombats}场战斗后，获得随机{Repeat}件遗物。

name: 头环
description: It's a circlet.
descriptionZh: 这是一个头环。

name: 弃用遗物
description: This relic is no longer in the game. It's just here for legacy purposes.
descriptionZh: 这件遗物已经从游戏中被移除。它在这里仅做纪念意义。
